## Frequently Asked Questions
### We’re happy to answer the most common questions.
What resources can I expect on PrepLounge?
To unlock your full potential in the real interview, it's important to build your preparation on multiple pillars. PrepLounge provides access to a huge collection of practice materials. Start now and:
  * Schedule mock interviews with [other candidates](https://www.preplounge.com/en/case-partner) and [coaches](https://www.preplounge.com/en/case-coach) from around the world.
  * Practice real interviews in our diverse [case library](https://www.preplounge.com/en/management-consulting-cases) of over 200 cases.
  * Study articles and business concepts in the [Case Interview Basics](https://www.preplounge.com/en/case-interview-basics) or through [video tutorials](https://www.preplounge.com/en/video-tutorials).
  * Use the [Mental Math Tool](https://www.preplounge.com/en/mental-math), [Stress Question Mode](https://www.preplounge.com/en/stress-questions), [exercises](https://www.preplounge.com/en/case-interview-exercises), and [additional tests](https://www.preplounge.com/en/shop/tests-and-guides?source=content-category) to refine your skills.
  * Ask industry-specific questions (e.g., Finance or Consulting) in our [Q&A](https://www.preplounge.com/en/consulting-forum?source=community-category) and engage with the community.


Who is PrepLounge for?
PrepLounge is for anyone preparing for challenging job interviews, whether you are:
  * Students and graduates
  * Career starters
  * Career changers
  * Experienced professionals


Our platform is tailored to various career levels and industries.
Does signing up on PrepLounge cost anything?
No, signing up on PrepLounge is completely free, and as a Basic member, you can test all the features and access a wide range of content. If you want to access the full offering, you can upgrade to a [Premium Membership](https://www.preplounge.com/en/shop/premium-memberships-1/premium-membership-1-year-4) later.
How can I practice with other candidates?
You can conduct virtual [mock interviews](https://www.preplounge.com/en/meeting-board) with other candidates who are also preparing for interviews. This allows you to gain valuable hands-on experience and improve your interview performance.
